ranked_groups.title: People denied/review guard-state fail-closed gap
ranked_groups.next_action: Fix PeopleHome/LegalPeopleWorkspace ctx forwarding, render denied/review state, and rerun guarded-state/read fail-closed checks.

ranked_groups.title: API write rows without complete precondition/audit/persistence proof
ranked_groups.next_action: Prioritize high-volume durable writes by domain; add safe fixture execution, reload/read-back, audit proof, and focused API tests before PASS.

ranked_groups.title: External provider, owner, payment, data-cloud, OS, notification, and updater receipts
ranked_groups.next_action: Collect external provider/owner/native receipts or keep rows BLOCKED with explicit non-claims.

ranked_groups.title: Desktop/native bridge runtime gaps
ranked_groups.next_action: Load active shell bridge/runtime paths or produce packaged runtime receipt for file bridge/runtime context rows.

ranked_groups.title: API read rows with partial/provisional proof
ranked_groups.next_action: Add browser/API read coverage and fail-closed/read-model evidence for remaining read rows.

ranked_groups.title: UI visible actions with missing/no-op handlers
ranked_groups.next_action: Wire handlers, remove controls, or relabel unavailable controls; add browser click receipts.

ranked_groups.title: Descriptor-only runtime/provider surfaces
ranked_groups.next_action: Build the missing runtime/provider/API layer or keep descriptor-only copy explicit.

ranked_groups.title: P7 visual, focus, mobile, Korean copy, and launch-boundary cleanup
ranked_groups.next_action: Bundle UI polish fixes and rerun mobile focus/overflow, copy review, and sloplint.

ranked_rows.label: Auth callback deep link
ranked_rows.handler: parseMatterDeepLink(matter://auth/callback?code&state&issuer) validates required query and returns auth_callback routeOnly intent; openMatterDeepLink records auth_callback opened audit without permission precheck; auth completion state validation remains MainProcessAuthCoordinator.completeCallback
ranked_rows.reason: External/provider/owner/native receipt gate blocks operational claim.

ranked_rows.label: Notification click route intent
ranked_rows.handler: notificationClickToRouteIntent(payload) requires routeUrl -> parseMatterDeepLink(routeUrl) -> returns { source: "notification", routeOnly: true, intent }
ranked_rows.reason: External/provider/owner/native receipt gate blocks operational claim.

ranked_rows.label: Signed internal update apply
ranked_rows.handler: createUpdateController().applyUpdate -> deny public channel -> verify HMAC signature -> set previousVersion/activeVersion; desktopSkeletonStatus.updateChannelExposed is false and no active app update IPC/channel is exposed in main.js
ranked_rows.reason: External/provider/owner/native receipt gate blocks operational claim.

ranked_rows.label: Signed internal rollback
ranked_rows.handler: createUpdateController().rollback -> require previousVersion, matching verified target version, and valid signature before rolled_back state
ranked_rows.reason: External/provider/owner/native receipt gate blocks operational claim.

ranked_rows.label: materRuntime.context
ranked_rows.handler: runtime.js contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld("materRuntime", runtimeApi), but active desktopPreloadPath() returns ../preload/session.cjs, not runtime.js
ranked_rows.reason: Native bridge/runtime proof gap blocks desktop action.

ranked_rows.label: Choose file for upload
ranked_rows.handler: fileBridgeApi.chooseFileForUpload(event, request) -> fileBridge:choose-file-for-upload -> createFileBridgeController.chooseFileForUpload; active shell does not load fileBridge.js preload or call registerFileBridgeIpcHandlers
ranked_rows.reason: Native bridge/runtime proof gap blocks desktop action.

ranked_rows.label: Save document as
ranked_rows.handler: fileBridgeApi.saveDocumentAs(event, request) -> fileBridge:save-document-as -> createFileBridgeController.saveDocumentAs; active shell does not load fileBridge.js preload or call registerFileBridgeIpcHandlers
ranked_rows.reason: Native bridge/runtime proof gap blocks desktop action.

ranked_rows.label: Open temp preview
ranked_rows.handler: createTempPreviewManager.openTempPreview -> assertNoRendererDocumentBytes -> permissionClient.precheckFileBridgeAction(file_bridge.preview) -> documentProvider.fetchDocumentForPreview -> storage.createScopedTempFile; no active shell IPC/preload registration found in main.js
ranked_rows.reason: Native bridge/runtime proof gap blocks desktop action.
